creator: minsoochoo0122@proton.me
text:
in forums.freebsd.org, which is a forum website, says that there is perforce repository on website header(Developers->Perforce Repository). Some components in header does not match with header in www.freebsd.org.

e.x.  - freebsd.org -> Developers -> Project Ideas, Subversion repository, Git Mirror, Code Review, etc.
        forums.freebsd.org -> Developers -> only has Project Ideas, Subversion repository, and Perforce repository, and Perforce repository is closed now.
